introSection: Comet Express is a steel spinning enclosed dark ride roller coaster located at Lotte World in Jamsil-Dong, Songpa-Gu, Seoul, South Korea.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Comet Express travels between three rooms each having helices. There are several elevation changes and booster wheels throughout propel it along quickly.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Comet Express on the parks website (In Korean)

fullText:
Comet Express is a steel spinning enclosed dark ride roller coaster located at Lotte World in Jamsil-Dong, Songpa-Gu, Seoul, South Korea.

Comet Express travels between three rooms each having helices. There are several elevation changes and booster wheels throughout propel it along quickly.


 * Comet Express on the parks website (In Korean)
